title: cephalanthera pallens
intro: Cephalanthera pallens, also known as the pale butterfly orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antiviral and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Cephalanthera pallens include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
